name: Metal and Rush Weave Top Console Table Black - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Mahogany Frame, Square Entryway Table
description:
Enhance your living room decor with this Metal and Rush Weave Top Console Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This decorative console table features a black metal frame with a square tabletop and lower shelf with woven detailing that provides extra space for your storage bins, books and other items. Place it behind the living room sofa or by the window to show off family photos and other decor.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
